_publications._publicationTitle: Development of patient reported outcome measures assessing tumor pain intensity and tumor pain interference for individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 and plexiform neurofibromas: qualitative findings.

_contextSnippet: Validation of these tools is underway, and they will be available for use after publication of the quantitative results
details: Validation of these tools is underway and they will be available for use after publication of quantitative results
